name: npm
description: npm registry connector — look up package metadata, search the index, and read download stats. Public registry by default; supports private registries via the registryUrl + token inputs (or a workspace `generic` config).

operation.description: Which npm registry call to run.

package.description: Package name (scoped names like `@daisy-workflow/plugin-sdk` work). Required by package.info and package.downloads.

version.description: Optional version. When omitted package.info returns the full package document; when set it returns just that version's manifest (or 'latest' / 'beta' / any other dist-tag).

query.description: Search text. Required by package.search. Supports the registry's qualifier syntax — e.g. 'react keywords:hooks maintainer:facebook'.

size.description: Page size for package.search (max 250 per the registry API).

registryUrl.description: Override the registry base URL for this call. Default: https://registry.npmjs.org. Set this for private registries (JFrog Artifactory, GitHub Packages, Verdaccio, etc.).

config.description: Optional workspace `generic` config holding `registryUrl` and/or `token`. The token is sent as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` — useful for authenticated private registries. Node-level inputs win over the config.

token.description: Authentication token for private registries. Sent as Bearer auth. Prefer setting this via the `config` input so it stays encrypted at rest.

status.description: HTTP status from the registry call.

result.description: Operation-specific payload. The package document or version manifest for package.info; { results, total } for package.search; { downloads, start, end } for package.downloads.

url.description: Canonical npmjs.com URL for the package (when applicable).
